steps.title: Substitute the given number of small boxes
steps.content: Replace a with 4 in the equation $$4a + 5b = 41$$: $$4(4) + 5b = 41$$ which simplifies to $$16 + 5b = 41$$.

steps.title: Solve for the number of large boxes
steps.content:
Subtract 16 from both sides: $$5b = 25$$.
Divide both sides by 5: $$b = 5$$.
B is the correct answer.
